particulars.description: Freehold land known as building 4, 100 and 110 york road, london (SW11 3RD) (TGL615724), leasehold land known as 100 york road, london (SW11 3RD) (TGL624643), the leasehold land to be known as the basement car park, 100 and 110 york road, battersea SW11 3RD as demised in a lease of part dated 29 february 2024 and granted out of title numbers TGL133573 and TGL188661 and made between (1) senex capital limited and (2) 99 york road residences limited, the leasehold land as demised in a lease over the compound area dated 29 february 2024 and made between (1) senex capital limited and (2) 99 york road residences limited, and the leasehold land relating to first floor, 110 york road, london SW11 3RD as demised in a lease dated 29 february 2024 and made between (1) senex capital limited and (2) 99 york road residences limited.

The freehold land to be known as building 4, 100 and 110 york road, battersea SW11 3RD and being the land transferred by a transfer of part dated on or about the date of this deed and made between (1) senex capital limited and (2) 99 york road residences limited with title number to be allocated by the land registry.. For more details please refer to the instrument.

persons_entitled.name: Solutus Advisors Limited as Security Trustee for the Secured Parties
